issues.description: AttachDon action missing required 'condition' field. Card text states 'Give up to 1 rested DON!! card' — this requires a condition checking that the DON card is rested. Should include condition: {"type":"HasRestingDon","count":1}

Activated ability missing 'cost' field. Card text '[Activate: Main] You may rest this Character' indicates resting this character is a cost, not an action. The Rest should be moved to a 'cost' object, not 'actions'
